name: jsondb-choice-fix
title: JsonDB Choice Guard Fix
description: Restores the isTranslatableProperties() guards for Choices (code 102) and Choice Options (code 402) in the rmrgss JsonDB parser. Without them the rmrgss worker thread crashes when a choice value is not a translatable string, aborting the whole parse. Self-healing: re-applies on every launch, so it survives Translator++ / rmrgss updates.
